improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners and traders. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and professional support—start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Gideon delivers instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners and traders. Try three free searches now.">
improvements.rationale: Search engines display meta descriptions in results, directly impacting click-through rates. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. The copy highlights the free trial offer to encourage clicks and clearly states the Claude-powered AI benefit without making unsupported claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for business owners and professionals. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately establishes what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it serves (trade and business). The subheading reinforces three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while clearly communicating the risk-free trial offer. Mentioning 'no credit card required' reduces friction and builds trust, encouraging visitors to engage before hitting the paywall.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a Gideon member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day and gives you unlimited access to your personal AI trade and business assistant—including voice chat and your own members workspace. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the paywall moment, reducing friction and anxiety for prospects who want to know what comes next. It reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace) and highlights the annual savings incentive, nudging toward higher-commitment plans.
